title: Nay's Thumbnail Pack
description: A Modpack purely made to add onto your modpacks or use apart to make your own thumbnails in minecraft
body:
Nay's Thumbnail Pack is, as the name suggest a modpack made fully to help you make thumbnails for your minecraft channel.


It can be used alone as well as with other modpacks. It uses mods such as Iris, CustomNPC, EasyNPC & ReplayMod to help you achieve the greatest for your content.


Here are some thumbnails i've made with the modpack so hopefully you can see more of the potential this modpack have :)


![Thumbnail - 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a4f39054649f3f6f2f4af3bdf615323440f347e_0.webp)

![Thumbnail - 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0c5626e983acd145cf2f7f0bf99194b4c149d2d.jpeg)

![Thumbnail - 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb4c6386e9f9ea5823f572a91cdc831a88348d0b.jpeg)

![Thumbnail - 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8efebcc30c4edfafcea6967479d2f536655caebe_0.webp)

![Thumbnail - 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f5dbb76416d0edf00d459f3241850ecdd6fd3c6_0.webp)


Here's also the link to copyrighted mods - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-npcs
